name: Cfbank, National Association
description_short: CFBank is a nationally chartered boutique bank headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, offering commercial and personal banking services across five Midwest locations with $2 billion in assets.
description_long:
CFBank is a nationally chartered, full-service boutique bank headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, with a focus on personalized relationship banking. The bank was founded with an emphasis on high-quality, highly desirable services tailored to both business and personal finance needs. CFBank maintains FDIC insurance backing and positions itself as a well-capitalized institution with strong credit quality and minimal treasury security exposure.

CFBank offers a comprehensive range of banking products and services including deposit accounts, commercial lending, equipment financing, commercial cards, and mortgage products. The bank provides 30-year fixed mortgages with rates starting at 5.75% APR, conventional and government mortgage options, and personal banking services. On the commercial side, they offer equipment financing and commercial card administration alongside traditional business deposit and lending solutions. The bank operates physical locations in Columbus, Cleveland, Cincinnati, Akron, and Indianapolis.

CFBank differentiates itself through its "boutique bank" positioning, emphasizing dedicated personal service and relationship-based banking rather than transactional volume. The bank has received recognition as a Piper Sandler All Star bank for four consecutive years and was named to the American Banker Top 10 list for two years in a row. Client testimonials highlight the bank's philanthropic involvement and hands-on approach, with dedicated relationship managers who understand individual client needs. The bank also emphasizes its commitment to community partnerships and nonprofit support.

As a regional boutique bank with $2 billion in assets, CFBank serves a specific market segment rather than competing on scale or digital-first convenience. The bank's strength lies in relationship banking and personalized service for business clients and individuals seeking high-touch banking experiences. However, as a regional bank with limited locations, CFBank may not be ideal for consumers seeking nationwide branch networks or cutting-edge digital banking platforms. The lack of mentioned online account opening or mobile app features suggests a more traditional banking model focused on in-person and phone-based service relationships. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Commercial lending and lines of credit
Commercial credit cards and commercial card administration
Business and personal relationship banking services
Dedicated account management and relationship support
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Well-capitalized bank with $2 billion in total assets and pristine credit quality
Dedicated relationship managers who understand individual client needs and provide personalized service
Recognized as Piper Sandler All Star bank for 4 consecutive years
Named to American Banker Top 10 list for 2 years in a row
Active philanthropic involvement and community partnership support documented through client testimonials
Competitive mortgage rates starting at 5.75% APR with conventional and government options available
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only 5 branch locations (Columbus, Cleveland, Cincinnati, Akron, Indianapolis)
No mention of online account opening, mobile app, or digital banking platforms for self-service
Regional bank with $2 billion in assets may lack resources or product variety of larger national banks
Boutique banking model may result in higher fees or less competitive rates on some products compared to large-scale competitors
Limited transparency on specific deposit products, APYs for savings/CDs, or full rate schedules on website

contact.address: 4960 E Dublin Granville Rd, Columbus, OH 43081

best_for: Business owners and commercial clients in Ohio and Indiana seeking dedicated relationship banking
Individuals in CFBank's service areas who value personalized service over digital banking convenience
Homebuyers seeking mortgage products with relationship-based service and conventional or government loan options
Nonprofits and community organizations aligned with CFBank's philanthropic mission
diagnosis: CFBank is best for regional business clients and individual customers in Ohio and Indiana who prioritize personalized relationship banking and are willing to conduct banking through branch visits or phone contact rather than fully digital channels. The main caveat is that CFBank's limited geographic footprint and apparent lack of prominent digital banking features make it unsuitable for customers seeking nationwide branch access or app-based banking convenience.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
